Steuerexperten/Steuerexpertin. ## Contatto - (No contact information provided)
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description Dans le domaine des impôts des sociétés, il ne s'agit pas seulement d'aider les entreprises à se conformer aux réglementations. Nous conseillons également les entreprises actives à l'échelle nationale ou internationale sur les réglementations et les développements fiscaux pertinents. Cela leur permet de créer des structures efficaces, de prendre en compte les implications fiscales des modèles commerciaux possibles et d'éviter les risques fiscaux. ## Responsabilités - Conseiller les entités juridiques de divers secteurs et industries sur les questions fiscales. - Accompagner la planification fiscale de nos clients nationaux et internationaux et calculer les provisions fiscales nécessaires pour fournir les meilleurs résultats possibles. - Traiter les demandes fiscales complexes et difficiles dans un environnement international et utiliser votre expertise pour trouver les meilleures solutions possibles. - Travailler sur des projets exigeants, souvent transfrontaliers, dans les domaines de la restructuration, de l'acquisition et de la vente de sociétés. Apporter vos connaissances pour contribuer avec succès au succès du projet. - Utiliser l'échange prometteur au sein du département fiscal et juridique pour se développer rapidement sur le plan personnel et professionnel. - Travailler dans une équipe inspirante et compléter une formation continue en tant qu'expert fiscal diplômé. ## Exigences - Diplôme de master d'une université ou d'une université polytechnique, idéalement en économie ou en droit. - S'intéresser aux questions fiscales et avoir déjà acquis une expérience initiale dans le domaine des impôts des sociétés/impôts. - Apporter votre flair pour les questions juridiques ainsi que pour les chiffres et les relations commerciales et travailler volontiers à l'interface du droit et de l'économie. - Être flexible, persévérant et ouvert à des situations difficiles et complexes et apprécier le travail d'équipe. Utiliser vos compétences individuelles pour atteindre les meilleurs résultats possibles. - S'intéresser aux questions interdisciplinaires et à l'échange avec nos clients. - Montrer une sécurité stylistique en allemand et avoir de très bonnes compétences en anglais pour opérer avec succès dans un environnement international. ## Ce que nous offrons - Une formation continue en tant qu'expert fiscal diplômé. ## Contact - (No contact information provided)

jobs.title: Senior Associate Customs & Trade Consulting
jobs.description:
• Provide advice to Swiss and international clients on Swiss, EU and US customs and trade regulations, including classification, valuation, origin, preferential trade agreements and export controls and sanctions.

• Help to develop solutions to complex customs-related challenges, including customs audits, investigations, and disputes.

• Assist the team and clients in understanding the impact of customs and trade laws on their business operations and supply chain.

• Have contact with clients, local and foreign Customs Authorities as well as with Customs, Trade and VAT experts from our international PwC network.

• You are working in our VAT and Customs team in Zurich.

• Participate in the development of our indirect tax practice.

• A degree in accounting, economics, business or law or similar education in the field of International Customs and Trade.

• High interest for Customs and Trade area.

• Fluency in English is required, as well as in German, French or Italian.

• 2 – 3 years of consulting experience in the area of customs and trade.

• Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and project management skills as well as consulting and team oriented mindset and take on responsibility for your projects.

• You are helping continuously to improve our service offerings.

titleByLocale.it: Senior Associate Consulting Dogana e Commercio
titleByLocale.en: Senior Associate Customs & Trade Consulting
titleByLocale.fr: Senior Associate Conseil en Douane et Commerce

descriptionByLocale.it: Mansioni - Fornire consulenza a clienti svizzeri e internazionali sulle normative doganali e commerciali svizzere, UE e statunitensi, compresa la classificazione, la valutazione, l'origine, gli accordi commerciali preferenziali e i controlli delle esportazioni e le sanzioni. - Aiutare a sviluppare soluzioni per sfide complesse legate alle dogane, comprese le verifiche doganali, le indagini e le controversie. - Assistere il team e i clienti nella comprensione dell'impatto delle leggi doganali e commerciali sulle loro operazioni aziendali e sulla catena di approvvigionamento. - Avere contatti con clienti, autorità doganali locali e straniere nonché con esperti di dogana, commercio e IVA della nostra rete internazionale PwC. - Lavorare nel nostro team IVA e dogana a Zurigo. - Partecipare allo sviluppo della nostra pratica di imposte indirette. ## Requisiti - Laurea in contabilità, economia, business o legge o istruzione simile nel campo del commercio e delle dogane internazionali. - Alto interesse per l'area dogana e commercio. - Fluente in inglese è richiesto, così come in tedesco, francese o italiano. - 2-3 anni di esperienza di consulenza nel settore dogana e commercio. - Eccellenti capacità analitiche, di risoluzione dei problemi e di gestione dei progetti nonché mentalità di consulenza e orientata al team e assumersi la responsabilità dei propri progetti. ## Cosa offriamo - Stai contribuendo continuamente a migliorare le nostre offerte di servizio. ## Contatto (nessuna informazione di contatto fornita)
descriptionByLocale.en: Mansioni - Provide advice to Swiss and international clients on Swiss, EU and US customs and trade regulations, including classification, valuation, origin, preferential trade agreements and export controls and sanctions. - Help to develop solutions to complex customs-related challenges, including customs audits, investigations, and disputes. - Assist the team and clients in understanding the impact of customs and trade laws on their business operations and supply chain. - Have contact with clients, local and foreign Customs Authorities as well as with Customs, Trade and VAT experts from our international PwC network. - You are working in our VAT and Customs team in Zurich. - Participate in the development of our indirect tax practice. ## Requisiti - A degree in accounting, economics, business or law or similar education in the field of International Customs and Trade. - High interest for Customs and Trade area. - Fluency in English is required, as well as in German, French or Italian. - 2 – 3 years of consulting experience in the area of customs and trade. - Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and project management skills as well as consulting and team oriented mindset and take on responsibility for your projects. ## Cosa offriamo - You are helping continuously to improve our service offerings. ## Contatto (no contact information provided)
descriptionByLocale.de: Aufgaben - Beratung von Schweizer und internationalen Kunden zu Schweizer, EU- und US-Zoll- und Handelsvorschriften, einschließlich Klassifizierung, Bewertung, Ursprung, präferenziellen Handelsabkommen und Exportkontrollen und -sanktionen. - Unterstützung bei der Entwicklung von Lösungen für komplexe zollbezogene Herausforderungen, einschließlich Zollprüfungen, -untersuchungen und -streitigkeiten. - Unterstützung des Teams und der Kunden bei der Verständigung der Auswirkungen von Zoll- und Handelsgesetzen auf ihre Geschäftsoperationen und Lieferketten. - Kontakt mit Kunden, lokalen und ausländischen Zollbehörden sowie mit Zoll-, Handels- und MWST-Experten unseres internationalen PwC-Netzwerks. - Tätigkeit in unserem Team MWST und Zoll in Zürich. - Beteiligung an der Entwicklung unserer indirekten Steuerpraxis. ## Anforderungen - Abschluss in Rechnungswesen, Ökonomie, Betriebswirtschaft oder Rechtswissenschaften oder ähnliche Ausbildung im Bereich Internationaler Zoll und Handel. - Starkes Interesse für den Bereich Zoll und Handel. - Fließende Sprachkenntnisse in Englisch sowie in Deutsch, Französisch oder Italienisch. - 2-3 Jahre Beratungserfahrung im Bereich Zoll und Handel. - Hervorragende analytische Fähigkeiten, Problemlösungs- und Projektmanagementfähigkeiten sowie Beratungs- und Teamorientierung und Übernahme von Verantwortung für eigene Projekte. ## Was wir bieten - Sie tragen kontinuierlich dazu bei, unsere Serviceangebote zu verbessern. ## Kontakt (keine Kontaktinformationen angegeben)
descriptionByLocale.fr: Missions - Fournir des conseils à des clients suisses et internationaux sur les réglementations douanières et commerciales suisses, UE et américaines, y compris la classification, l'évaluation, l'origine, les accords commerciaux préférentiels et les contrôles à l'exportation et les sanctions. - Aider à développer des solutions pour des défis complexes liés aux douanes, y compris les audits douaniers, les enquêtes et les litiges. - Assister l'équipe et les clients à comprendre l'impact des lois douanières et commerciales sur leurs opérations commerciales et leur chaîne d'approvisionnement. - Avoir des contacts avec les clients, les autorités douanières locales et étrangères ainsi qu'avec les experts en douane, commerce et TVA de notre réseau international PwC. - Travailler dans notre équipe TVA et douane à Zurich. - Participer au développement de notre pratique de taxes indirectes. ## Exigences - Diplôme en comptabilité, économie, gestion ou droit ou formation similaire dans le domaine du commerce et des douanes internationales. - Intérêt élevé pour le domaine de la douane et du commerce. - Maîtrise de l'anglais ainsi que du français, de l'allemand ou de l'italien. - 2-3 ans d'expérience en conseil dans le domaine de la douane et du commerce. - Excellentes compétences analytiques, de résolution de problèmes et de gestion de projet ainsi que mentalité de conseil et d'orientation équipe et prise en charge de la responsabilité de vos projets. ## Ce que nous offrons - Vous contribuez en permanence à améliorer nos offres de services. ## Contact (aucune information de contact fournie)

jobs.title: Senior Manager FS Risk Consulting focus Technology
jobs.description:
Join a dynamic team that prides itself on being true partners to a diverse clientele, including banking, insurance, multinationals, and smaller organizations. We focus on solving complex problems through impactful and transformational projects, both large and small.
Our team is a unique blend of specialists and all-rounders, fostering a culture of mutual support and shared growth. We value collaboration, ensuring that everyone's contributions uplift team performance and enhance client outcomes. We offer an engaging work culture that promotes continuous learning and professional development, providing opportunities to work on diverse projects that challenge and expand your expertise.

• Engage with clients to understand their risk technology needs and deliver tailored solutions.

• Implement leading GRC platforms, ensuring they align with client-specific risk strategies and compliance requirements.

• Assess technology risks across client environments and provide actionable insights for improvement.

• Advise clients on integrating risk intelligence into their technology landscapes for optimized decision-making.

• Lead risk transformation initiatives and drive digital enablement in the financial services industry.

• Driving teams to embed risk technology in delivery and collaborate regularly with PwC Global for alignment.

• Representing and growing our risk technology presence in the market.

• Strong expertise in risk technology and building partnerships with alliances and PwC Global. You will be the key contact to ensure the right tools are used for clients.

• Deep understanding of Risk Management Frameworks including COSO, ISO 31000, NIST, and COBIT.

• Expertise in Technology Risk.

• Proficiency with GRC Platforms such as RSA Archer, ServiceNow GRC, MetricStream, LogicGate, and OpenPages.

• Familiarity with Enterprise Applications Risk including SAP GRC and Oracle Risk Management Cloud.

• Utilize Data & Analytics in Risk by leveraging tools like Power BI, Tableau, Python, and SQL for risk analysis, dashboards, and anomaly detection.

• Experience with Emerging Tech in Risk, including cloud risk on AWS and Azure, AI/ML model governance, blockchain risk, and third-party risk management (TPRM) platforms.

If you're a seasoned Risk Technology professional passionate about transforming risk management within technology environments, we'd love to hear from you. Apply now to join a team that truly values innovation, collaboration, and excellence in client service.

titleByLocale.it: Senior Manager FS Risk Consulting focalizzata sulla tecnologia
titleByLocale.en: Senior Manager FS Risk Consulting focus Technology
titleByLocale.de: Senior Manager FS Risk Consulting mit Schwerpunkt Technologie
titleByLocale.fr: Gestionnaire principal Services de conseillers en gestion des risques Technologie

descriptionByLocale.it: Entra a far parte di un team dinamico che si distingue per essere un vero partner per una clientela diversificata, tra cui banche, assicurazioni, multinazionali e organizzazioni più piccole. Ci concentriamo sulla risoluzione di problemi complessi attraverso progetti di impatto e trasformazione, grandi e piccoli. Il nostro team è un mix unico di specialisti e figure polivalenti, che promuove una cultura di supporto reciproco e crescita condivisa. Valorizziamo la collaborazione, assicurandoci che i contributi di tutti migliorino le prestazioni del team e i risultati per i clienti. Offriamo una cultura lavorativa coinvolgente che promuove l'apprendimento continuo e lo sviluppo professionale, fornendo opportunità di lavorare su progetti diversi che sfidano ed ampliano la tua competenza. Interagire con i clienti per comprendere le loro esigenze in materia di tecnologia del rischio e fornire soluzioni su misura. Implementare le principali piattaforme GRC, assicurandosi che siano allineate alle strategie di rischio specifiche del cliente e ai requisiti di conformità. Valutare i rischi tecnologici negli ambienti dei clienti e fornire indicazioni operative per il miglioramento. Consigliare i clienti sull'integrazione dell'intelligence del rischio nei loro scenari tecnologici per un processo decisionale ottimizzato. Guidare le iniziative di trasformazione del rischio e favorire l'abilitazione digitale nel settore dei servizi finanziari. Guidare i team nell'incorporazione della tecnologia del rischio nella delivery e collaborare regolarmente con PwC Global per l'allineamento. Rappresentare e sviluppare la nostra presenza nel mercato della tecnologia del rischio. Solida competenza nella tecnologia del rischio e nella costruzione di partnership con alleanze e PwC Global. Sarai il punto di contatto chiave per garantire l'utilizzo degli strumenti giusti per i clienti. Profonda comprensione dei Framework di Risk Management, tra cui COSO, ISO 31000, NIST e COBIT. Espertise nel Technology Risk. Padronanza delle piattaforme GRC come RSA Archer, ServiceNow GRC, MetricStream, LogicGate e OpenPages. Familiarità con il rischio delle applicazioni aziendali, inclusi SAP GRC e Oracle Risk Management Cloud. Utilizzo di Data & Analytics nel Risk sfruttando strumenti come Power BI, Tableau, Python e SQL per l'analisi del rischio, dashboard e rilevamento di anomalie. Esperienza con le tecnologie emergenti nel Risk, incluso il rischio cloud su AWS e Azure, la governance dei modelli AI/ML, il rischio blockchain e le piattaforme di gestione del rischio di terze parti (TPRM). Se sei un professionista esperto nella tecnologia del rischio, appassionato di trasformare la gestione del rischio negli ambienti tecnologici, ci piacerebbe sentirti. Candidati ora per unirti a un team che valorizza davvero l'innovazione, la collaborazione e l'eccellenza nel servizio al cliente.
descriptionByLocale.en: Join a dynamic team that prides itself on being true partners to a diverse clientele, including banking, insurance, multinationals, and smaller organizations. We focus on solving complex problems through impactful and transformational projects, both large and small. Our team is a unique blend of specialists and all-rounders, fostering a culture of mutual support and shared growth. We value collaboration, ensuring that everyone's contributions uplift team performance and enhance client outcomes. We offer an engaging work culture that promotes continuous learning and professional development, providing opportunities to work on diverse projects that challenge and expand your expertise. Engage with clients to understand their risk technology needs and deliver tailored solutions. Implement leading GRC platforms, ensuring they align with client-specific risk strategies and compliance requirements. Assess technology risks across client environments and provide actionable insights for improvement. Advise clients on integrating risk intelligence into their technology landscapes for optimized decision-making. Lead risk transformation initiatives and drive digital enablement in the financial services industry. Driving teams to embed risk technology in delivery and collaborate regularly with PwC Global for alignment. Representing and growing our risk technology presence in the market. Strong expertise in risk technology and building partnerships with alliances and PwC Global. You will be the key contact to ensure the right tools are used for clients. Deep understanding of Risk Management Frameworks including COSO, ISO 31000, NIST, and COBIT. Expertise in Technology Risk. Proficiency with GRC Platforms such as RSA Archer, ServiceNow GRC, MetricStream, LogicGate, and OpenPages. Familiarity with Enterprise Applications Risk including SAP GRC and Oracle Risk Management Cloud. Utilize Data & Analytics in Risk by leveraging tools like Power BI, Tableau, Python, and SQL for risk analysis, dashboards, and anomaly detection. Experience with Emerging Tech in Risk, including cloud risk on AWS and Azure, AI/ML model governance, blockchain risk, and third-party risk management (TPRM) platforms. If you're a seasoned Risk Technology professional passionate about transforming risk management within technology environments, we'd love to hear from you. Apply now to join a team that truly values innovation, collaboration, and excellence in client service.
descriptionByLocale.de: Werden Sie Teil eines dynamischen Teams, das stolz darauf ist, ein echter Partner für eine vielfältige Kundschaft zu sein, darunter Banken, Versicherungen, multinationale Konzerne und kleinere Unternehmen. Wir konzentrieren uns auf die Lösung komplexer Probleme durch wirkungsvolle und transformative Projekte, sowohl grosse als auch kleine. Unser Team ist eine einzigartige Mischung aus Spezialisten und Generalisten und fördert eine Kultur der gegenseitigen Unterstützung und des gemeinsamen Wachstums. Wir legen Wert auf Zusammenarbeit und stellen sicher, dass die Beiträge aller die Teamleistung steigern und die Kundenergebnisse verbessern. Wir bieten eine ansprechende Arbeitskultur, die kontinuierliches Lernen und berufliche Weiterentwicklung fördert, und bieten die Möglichkeit, an vielfältigen Projekten zu arbeiten, die Ihr Fachwissen herausfordern und erweitern. Kundenkontakt aufnehmen, um deren Anforderungen an Risikotechnologie zu verstehen und massgeschneiderte Lösungen zu liefern. Führende GRC-Plattformen implementieren und sicherstellen, dass sie mit den kundenspezifischen Risikostrategien und Compliance-Anforderungen übereinstimmen. Technologierisiken in den Kundenumgebungen bewerten und umsetzbare Erkenntnisse zur Verbesserung liefern. Kunden bei der Integration von Risikointelligenz in ihre Technologielandschaft für eine optimierte Entscheidungsfindung beraten. Risikotransformationsinitiativen leiten und die digitale Befähigung in der Finanzdienstleistungsbranche vorantreiben. Teams dabei führen, Risikotechnologie in die Delivery einzubetten, und regelmässig mit PwC Global für die Ausrichtung zusammenarbeiten. Unsere Risikotechnologie-Präsenz im Markt repräsentieren und ausbauen. Ausgewiesene Expertise in Risikotechnologie und dem Aufbau von Partnerschaften mit Allianzen und PwC Global. Sie sind der wichtigste Ansprechpartner, um sicherzustellen, dass für Kunden die richtigen Tools eingesetzt werden. Tiefes Verständnis der Risk-Management-Frameworks, einschliesslich COSO, ISO 31000, NIST und COBIT. Expertise im Technology Risk. Kenntnisse in GRC-Plattformen wie RSA Archer, ServiceNow GRC, MetricStream, LogicGate und OpenPages. Vertrautheit mit Enterprise-Applications-Risiken, einschliesslich SAP GRC und Oracle Risk Management Cloud. Nutzung von Data & Analytics im Risk durch den Einsatz von Tools wie Power BI, Tableau, Python und SQL für Risikoanalysen, Dashboards und Anomalieerkennung. Erfahrung mit Emerging Tech im Risk, einschliesslich Cloud-Risiken auf AWS und Azure, KI/ML-Modell-Governance, Blockchain-Risiken und Plattformen für das Drittparteien-Risikomanagement (TPRM). Wenn Sie ein erfahrener Risikotechnologie-Profi sind, der leidenschaftlich daran interessiert ist, das Risikomanagement in technologischen Umgebungen zu transformieren, würden wir uns freuen, von Ihnen zu hören. Bewerben Sie sich jetzt und werden Sie Teil eines Teams, das Innovation, Zusammenarbeit und Exzellenz im Kundendienst wirklich wertschätzt.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Rejoignez une équipe dynamique qui se distingue en étant un véritable partenaire pour une clientèle diversifiée, comprenant des banques, des assurances, des multinationales et des organisations plus petites. Nous nous concentrons sur la résolution de problèmes complexes à travers des projets impactants et transformateurs, aussi bien grands que petits. Notre équipe est un mélange unique de spécialistes et de généralistes, favorisant une culture de soutien mutuel et de croissance partagée. Nous valorisons la collaboration, en veillant à ce que les contributions de chacun améliorent les performances de l'équipe et les résultats pour les clients. Nous offrons une culture de travail engageante qui favorise l'apprentissage continu et le développement professionnel, en offrant des opportunités de travailler sur des projets variés qui challengent et élargissent votre expertise. Interagir avec les clients pour comprendre leurs besoins en matière de technologie du risque et fournir des solutions sur mesure. Mettre en œuvre des plateformes GRC de premier plan, en veillant à ce qu'elles s'alignent sur les stratégies de risque spécifiques au client et les exigences de conformité. Évaluer les risques technologiques dans les environnements clients et fournir des recommandations concrètes pour l'amélioration. Conseiller les clients sur l'intégration de l'intelligence du risque dans leurs paysages technologiques pour une prise de décision optimisée. Diriger les initiatives de transformation du risque et favoriser l'activation numérique dans le secteur des services financiers. Guider les équipes pour intégrer la technologie du risque dans la delivery et collaborer régulièrement avec PwC Global pour l'alignement. Représenter et développer notre présence en matière de technologie du risque sur le marché. Forte expertise dans la technologie du risque et dans l'établissement de partenariats avec des alliances et PwC Global. Vous serez le contact clé pour vous assurer que les bons outils sont utilisés pour les clients. Compréhension approfondie des Cadres de Gestion des Risques, notamment COSO, ISO 31000, NIST et COBIT. Expertise dans le Technology Risk. Maîtrise des plateformes GRC telles que RSA Archer, ServiceNow GRC, MetricStream, LogicGate et OpenPages. Familiarité avec le risque des applications d'entreprise, notamment SAP GRC et Oracle Risk Management Cloud. Utilisation de la Data & Analytics dans le Risk en exploitant des outils tels que Power BI, Tableau, Python et SQL pour l'analyse des risques, les tableaux de bord et la détection d'anomalies. Expérience avec les technologies émergentes dans le Risk, notamment le risque cloud sur AWS et Azure, la gouvernance des modèles AI/ML, le risque blockchain et les plateformes de gestion du risque tiers (TPRM). Si vous êtes un professionnel expérimenté en technologie du risque, passionné par la transformation de la gestion des risques dans les environnements technologiques, nous serions ravis d'avoir de vos nouvelles. Postulez maintenant pour rejoindre une équipe qui valorise réellement l'innovation, la collaboration et l'excellence dans le service client.

jobs.title: Senior Cyber Security Architect (Manager/Senior Manager)
jobs.description:
Are you eager to make a mark in the market as a knowledgeable and influential figure in cyber security architecture and solutions in the areas such as Cloud, OT, Zero Trust, Data & Network? Look no further because you have found your place. Join our team and support our Cybersecurity unit in evolving our cyber transformation practice.
As part of our global network, you will have the opportunity to collaborate with diverse and compelling teams, where your proactive and forward-thinking mindset will be highly valued and encouraged.

• Join our diverse Cybersecurity team and collaborate within our global community of experts to guide the design and implementation of comprehensive cybersecurity architectures for clients.

• You will be responsible for designing and delivering robust, scalable, and future-proof security architectures for our diverse client base

• Act as the lead security architect on projects, providing expert guidance and industry good practices. Example areas would be Zero Trust, Network, OT, Data & Cloud, Cryptography.

• Assess client cybersecurity posture and provide strategic recommendations aligned with industry best practices and regulatory requirements

• You will be a key role in large scale business and cyber transformation programs. You will also collaborate closely with client IT, risk, and compliance teams to integrate security solutions into business processes

• Conduct security risk assessments and threat modeling to guide architecture decisions.

• Participate in proposals, client presentations, and workshops to communicate complex security concepts clearly to technical and non-technical stakeholders.

• Cultivate a client network, establishing yourself as the go-to person on security needs within PwC.

• Coach and develop your team members on their career path, while contributing to the overall team growth strategy.

• At least 8+ years of experience in Information Security architecture with at least 4 years dedicated to security architecture. Additionally, well conversent in Cloud, Network, Zero Trust, Data Protection, or any related domains.

• Hold a bachelor's or master's degree in IT, Business IT or a related field. Information Security certifications such as CISSP, SABSA, CISM, TOGAF, or CCSP are highly desirable

• Experience with DevSecOps practices , and implementation of security tools is a strong plus.

• Good mentorship and team-building skills.

• Ability to communicate complex security concepts in busines context to a broad range of audiences.

• Strong communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to engage executive-level stakeholders.

• Analytical mindset and problem-solving skills with attention to detail

• Fluent in English; German or French are a plus.

titleByLocale.it: Senior Cyber Security Architetto (Manager/Senior Manager)
titleByLocale.en: Senior Cyber Security Architect (Manager/Senior Manager)
titleByLocale.fr: Senior Cyber Security Architecte (Manager/Senior Manager)

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Sei pronto a lasciare un'impronta nel mercato come figura influente e competente nell'architettura e nelle soluzioni di sicurezza informatica in aree come Cloud, OT, Zero Trust, Data & Network? Non cercare oltre, hai trovato il tuo posto. Unisciti al nostro team e supporta la nostra unità di sicurezza informatica nell'evoluzione della nostra pratica di trasformazione informatica. Come parte della nostra rete globale, avrai l'opportunità di collaborare con team diversi e stimolanti, dove la tua mentalità proattiva e lungimirante sarà molto apprezzata e incoraggiata. ## Mansioni - Unisciti al nostro team di sicurezza informatica diversificato e collabora all'interno della nostra comunità globale di esperti per guidare la progettazione e l'implementazione di architetture di sicurezza informatica complete per i clienti. - Sarai responsabile della progettazione e della realizzazione di architetture di sicurezza robuste, scalabili e a prova di futuro per la nostra base di clienti diversificata - Agisci come architetto di sicurezza principale nei progetti, fornendo una guida esperta e le migliori pratiche del settore. Esempi di aree di intervento sarebbero Zero Trust, Network, OT, Data & Cloud, Crittografia. - Valuta la postura di sicurezza informatica dei clienti e fornisci raccomandazioni strategiche allineate con le migliori pratiche del settore e i requisiti normativi - Sarai un ruolo chiave in programmi di trasformazione aziendale e informatica su larga scala. Collaborerai inoltre a stretto contatto con i team IT, rischio e conformità dei clienti per integrare le soluzioni di sicurezza nei processi aziendali - Conduci valutazioni del rischio di sicurezza e modelazione delle minacce per guidare le decisioni di architettura. - Partecipa a proposte, presentazioni ai clienti e workshop per comunicare concetti di sicurezza complessi in modo chiaro a stakeholder tecnici e non tecnici. - Coltiva una rete di clienti, affermandoti come la persona di riferimento per le esigenze di sicurezza all'interno di PwC. - Forma e sviluppa i membri del tuo team nel loro percorso di carriera, contribuendo alla strategia di crescita complessiva del team. ## Requisiti - Almeno 8+ anni di esperienza nell'architettura di sicurezza informatica con almeno 4 anni dedicati all'architettura di sicurezza. - Inoltre, è necessario avere una buona conoscenza di Cloud, Network, Zero Trust, Protezione dei dati o domini correlati. - Possedere una laurea o un master in IT, Business IT o un campo correlato. - Le certificazioni di sicurezza informatica come CISSP, SABSA, CISM, TOGAF o CCSP sono molto desiderabili - L'esperienza con le pratiche DevSecOps e l'implementazione di strumenti di sicurezza è un forte vantaggio. - Buone competenze di mentorship e team-building. - Capacità di comunicare concetti di sicurezza complessi nel contesto aziendale a un'ampia gamma di pubblico. - Forti competenze di comunicazione, presentazione e interpersonali, con la capacità di coinvolgere stakeholder di livello esecutivo. - Mentalità analitica e capacità di risoluzione dei problemi con attenzione al dettaglio - Fluente in inglese; tedesco o francese sono un vantaggio. ## Cosa offriamo Nessuna informazione disponibile. ## Contatto Nessuna informazione disponibile.

Look no further because you have found your place. Join our team and support our Cybersecurity unit in evolving our cyber transformation practice. As part of our global network, you will have the opportunity to collaborate with diverse and compelling teams, where your proactive and forward-thinking mindset will be highly valued and encouraged. ## Mansioni - Join our diverse Cybersecurity team and collaborate within our global community of experts to guide the design and implementation of comprehensive cybersecurity architectures for clients. - You will be responsible for designing and delivering robust, scalable, and future-proof security architectures for our diverse client base - Act as the lead security architect on projects, providing expert guidance and industry good practices. Example areas would be Zero Trust, Network, OT, Data & Cloud, Cryptography. - Assess client cybersecurity posture and provide strategic recommendations aligned with industry best practices and regulatory requirements - You will be a key role in large scale business and cyber transformation programs. You will also collaborate closely with client IT, risk, and compliance teams to integrate security solutions into business processes - Conduct security risk assessments and threat modeling to guide architecture decisions. - Participate in proposals, client presentations, and workshops to communicate complex security concepts clearly to technical and non-technical stakeholders. - Cultivate a client network, establishing yourself as the go-to person on security needs within PwC. - Coach and develop your team members on their career path, while contributing to the overall team growth strategy. ## Requisiti - At least 8+ years of experience in Information Security architecture with at least 4 years dedicated to security architecture. - Additionally, well conversent in Cloud, Network, Zero Trust, Data Protection, or any related domains. - Hold a bachelor's or master's degree in IT, Business IT or a related field. - Information Security certifications such as CISSP, SABSA, CISM, TOGAF, or CCSP are highly desirable - Experience with DevSecOps practices , and implementation of security tools is a strong plus. - Good mentorship and team-building skills. - Ability to communicate complex security concepts in busines context to a broad range of audiences. - Strong communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to engage executive-level stakeholders. - Analytical mindset and problem-solving skills with attention to detail - Fluent in English; German or French are a plus. ## Cosa offriamo No information available. ## Contatto No information available.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Sind Sie bereit, als kompetente und einflussreiche Persönlichkeit in der Cyber-Sicherheitsarchitektur und -Lösungen in Bereichen wie Cloud, OT, Zero Trust, Data & Network einen Beitrag zu leisten? Dann haben Sie Ihren Platz gefunden. Begleiten Sie unser Team und unterstützen Sie unsere Einheit für Cyber-Sicherheit bei der Weiterentwicklung unserer Praxis für Cyber-Transformation. Als Teil unseres globalen Netzwerks haben Sie die Gelegenheit, mit diversen und spannenden Teams zusammenzuarbeiten, in denen Ihre proaktive und zukunftsorientierte Denkweise hoch geschätzt und gefördert wird. ## Aufgaben - Begleiten Sie unser diversifiziertes Team für Cyber-Sicherheit und arbeiten Sie innerhalb unserer globalen Gemeinschaft von Experten mit, um die Gestaltung und Implementierung von umfassenden Cyber-Sicherheitsarchitekturen für Kunden zu leiten. - Sie werden für die Gestaltung und Bereitstellung von robusten, skalierbaren und zukunftssicheren Sicherheitsarchitekturen für unsere diversifizierte Kundenbasis verantwortlich sein - Fungieren Sie als leitender Sicherheitsarchitekt bei Projekten und bieten Sie expertische Anleitung und Branchen-Best-Practices. Beispiele für Interventionsbereiche wären Zero Trust, Network, OT, Data & Cloud, Kryptographie. - Bewerten Sie die Cyber-Sicherheitsposition von Kunden und bieten Sie strategische Empfehlungen an, die an Branchen-Best-Practices und regulatorischen Anforderungen ausgerichtet sind - Sie werden eine Schlüsselrolle in großen Geschäfts- und Cyber-Transformationsprogrammen spielen. Sie werden auch eng mit den IT-, Risiko- und Compliance-Teams der Kunden zusammenarbeiten, um Sicherheitslösungen in Geschäftsprozesse zu integrieren - Führen Sie Sicherheitsrisiko-Bewertungen und Bedrohungsmodelierungen durch, um Architekturentscheidungen zu leiten. - Nehmen Sie an Vorschlägen, Kundenpräsentationen und Workshops teil, um komplexe Sicherheitskonzepte klar an technische und nicht-technische Interessengruppen zu kommunizieren. - Pflegen Sie ein Kundennetzwerk und etablieren Sie sich als Ansprechpartner für Sicherheitsanforderungen innerhalb von PwC. - Coachen und entwickeln Sie die Mitglieder Ihres Teams auf ihrem Karriereweg und tragen Sie zur Wachstumsstrategie des gesamten Teams bei. ## Anforderungen - Mindestens 8+ Jahre Erfahrung in der Architektur von Cyber-Sicherheit mit mindestens 4 Jahren, die der Sicherheitsarchitektur gewidmet sind. - Darüber hinaus sollten Sie über gute Kenntnisse in Cloud, Network, Zero Trust, Datenschutz oder verwandten Domänen verfügen. - Sie sollten einen Bachelor- oder Masterabschluss in IT, Business IT oder einem verwandten Feld besitzen. - Zertifizierungen für Cyber-Sicherheit wie CISSP, SABSA, CISM, TOGAF oder CCSP sind sehr erwünscht - Erfahrung mit DevSecOps-Praktiken und Implementierung von Sicherheitstools ist ein starkes Plus. - Gute Mentoren- und Teambuilding-Fähigkeiten. - Fähigkeit, komplexe Sicherheitskonzepte im Geschäftskontext an ein breites Publikum zu kommunizieren. - Starke Kommunikations-, Präsentations- und zwischenmenschliche Fähigkeiten, mit der Fähigkeit, Führungskräfte auf höchster Ebene zu involvieren. - Analytische Denkweise und Problemlösungsfähigkeiten mit Aufmerksamkeit für Details - Fließend in Englisch; Deutsch oder Französisch sind ein Plus. ## Was bieten wir Keine Informationen verfügbar. ## Kontakt Keine Informationen verfügbar.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description Êtes-vous prêt à marquer votre empreinte sur le marché en tant que figure influente et compétente dans l'architecture et les solutions de sécurité informatique dans des domaines tels que Cloud, OT, Zero Trust, Data & Network ? Ne cherchez pas plus loin, vous avez trouvé votre place. Rejoignez notre équipe et soutenez notre unité de sécurité informatique dans l'évolution de notre pratique de transformation informatique. En tant que partie de notre réseau mondial, vous aurez l'opportunité de collaborer avec des équipes diverses et stimulantes, où votre esprit proactif et prospectif sera hautement valorisé et encouragé. ## Missions - Rejoignez notre équipe diversifiée de sécurité informatique et collaborez au sein de notre communauté mondiale d'experts pour guider la conception et la mise en œuvre d'architectures de sécurité informatique complètes pour les clients. - Vous serez responsable de la conception et de la fourniture d'architectures de sécurité robustes, scalables et à l'épreuve du futur pour notre base de clients diversifiée - Agissez en tant qu'architecte de sécurité principal sur les projets, en fournissant des conseils d'experts et des bonnes pratiques du secteur. Les exemples de domaines d'intervention seraient Zero Trust, Network, OT, Data & Cloud, Cryptographie. - Évaluez la posture de sécurité informatique des clients et fournissez des recommandations stratégiques alignées sur les meilleures pratiques du secteur et les exigences réglementaires - Vous jouerez un rôle clé dans les programmes de transformation métier et informatique à grande échelle. Vous collaborerez également étroitement avec les équipes IT, risque et conformité des clients pour intégrer les solutions de sécurité dans les processus métier - Menez des évaluations des risques de sécurité et des modélisations de menaces pour guider les décisions d'architecture. - Participez aux propositions, aux présentations aux clients et aux ateliers pour communiquer clairement des concepts de sécurité complexes à des parties prenantes techniques et non techniques. - Cultivez un réseau de clients et établissez-vous en tant que personne de référence pour les besoins de sécurité au sein de PwC. - Coach et développez les membres de votre équipe sur leur parcours de carrière, tout en contribuant à la stratégie de croissance globale de l'équipe. ## Exigences - Au moins 8+ années d'expérience dans l'architecture de sécurité informatique avec au moins 4 ans consacrés à l'architecture de sécurité. - En outre, soyez bien versé dans Cloud, Network, Zero Trust, Protection des données ou domaines connexes. - Possédez un baccalauréat ou une maîtrise en IT, Business IT ou un domaine connexe. - Les certifications de sécurité informatique telles que CISSP, SABSA, CISM, TOGAF ou CCSP sont hautement souhaitables - L'expérience avec les pratiques DevSecOps et la mise en œuvre d'outils de sécurité est un atout important. - De bonnes compétences en mentorat et en construction d'équipe. - Capacité à communiquer des concepts de sécurité complexes dans le contexte commercial à un large public. - Fortes compétences en communication, en présentation et en relations interpersonnelles, avec la capacité de mobiliser des parties prenantes de niveau exécutif. - Esprit analytique et capacités de résolution de problèmes avec attention aux détails - Courant en anglais; l'allemand ou le français sont un plus. ## Ce que nous offrons Aucune information disponible. ## Contact Aucune information disponible.

jobs.title: Manager / Senior Manager - Cyber Technology and Transformation
jobs.description:
Are you ready to contribute to the successful delivery of Cyber Technology & Transformation engagements?
This is an exciting opportunity to join our fast growing Cyber Technology and Transformation team. We support our clients along the whole cyber security journey, ranging from technology assessments, identification and implementation of cyber solutions, defining cyber strategy and many more. You benefit from a great team to work with and from our broad engagements enabling you to growth personally and professionally.

• Be part of our diverse Cybersecurity team and play a pivotal role in delivering security engagements spanning Exposure Management, Security Architecture, Cloud Security, and many more.

• Serve as key contact for our clients, taking on the end-to-end management and successful delivery of our engagements.

• Provide strategic guidance to clients to support them on their cyber journey.

• Drive the evaluation and implementation of cyber technologies to improve the cybersecurity maturity of our clients.

• Build and drive your own cyber capability, from business development to contributing to the development of innovative services within our cyber technology and transformation practice.

• Shape and mentor cross-functional teams to develop and execute long term client relationships and to accelerate a collaborative work environment.

• Min. 5 years of relevant experience in Cybersecurity and prior consulting experience from either a consultancy firm or an internal corporate consulting function or role.

• Master's or bachelor's degree or an equivalent professional qualification. Additional certificates such as CISSP, CISM, SSCP are a plus.

• Knowledge and hands on experience in managing security projects in key domains such as security operations, security architecture, Identity and Access Management (IAM), cloud security etc.

• Strong verbal and written communication skills to interact effectively with all levels of management and staff.

• Fluent in English; German or French are a plus.

titleByLocale.it: Manager / Senior Manager Cyber Technology and Transformation
titleByLocale.en: Manager / Senior Manager - Cyber Technology and Transformation
titleByLocale.de: Manager / Senior Manager Cyber Technology and Transformation
titleByLocale.fr: Gestionnaire / Gestionnaire principal Cybertechnologie et transformation

descriptionByLocale.it: Sei pronto a contribuire alla realizzazione di successo di incarichi nell'ambito di Cyber Technology & Transformation? Questa è un'opportunità entusiasmante per entrare a far parte del nostro team Cyber Technology and Transformation in rapida crescita. Supportiamo i nostri clienti lungo l'intero percorso di cyber security, che spazia dalle valutazioni tecnologiche, all'identificazione e implementazione di soluzioni cyber, alla definizione di strategie cyber e molto altro. Beneficerai di un ottimo team con cui lavorare e dei nostri ampi incarichi che ti permettono di crescere personalmente e professionalmente. Fa parte del nostro team Cybersecurity diversificato e svolgi un ruolo fondamentale nella gestione di incarichi di sicurezza che spaziano da Exposure Management, Security Architecture, Cloud Security e molto altro. Fungere da punto di contatto chiave per i nostri clienti, assumendo la gestione end-to-end e la consegna di successo dei nostri incarichi. Fornire una guida strategica ai clienti per supportarli nel loro percorso cyber. Guidare la valutazione e l'implementazione di tecnologie cyber per migliorare la maturità in materia di cybersecurity dei nostri clienti. Costruire e sviluppare la propria capacità cyber, dallo sviluppo del business fino alla contribuzione allo sviluppo di servizi innovativi all'interno della nostra practice di cyber technology e transformation. Formare e fare da mentore a team interfunzionali per sviluppare ed eseguire relazioni a lungo termine con i clienti e per accelerare un ambiente di lavoro collaborativo. Almeno 5 anni di esperienza rilevante in Cybersecurity e precedente esperienza di consulenza sia in una società di consulenza che in una funzione o ruolo di consulenza aziendale interna. Laurea magistrale o triennale o una qualifica professionale equivalente. Certificazioni aggiuntive come CISSP, CISM, SSCP sono un plus. Conoscenza ed esperienza pratica nella gestione di progetti di sicurezza in aree chiave come operazioni di sicurezza, architettura di sicurezza, Identity and Access Management (IAM), cloud security ecc. Forti capacità di comunicazione verbale e scritta per interagire efficacemente con tutti i livelli del management e del personale. Padronanza dell'inglese; il tedesco o il francese sono un plus.
descriptionByLocale.en: Are you ready to contribute to the successful delivery of Cyber Technology & Transformation engagements? This is an exciting opportunity to join our fast growing Cyber Technology and Transformation team. We support our clients along the whole cyber security journey, ranging from technology assessments, identification and implementation of cyber solutions, defining cyber strategy and many more. You benefit from a great team to work with and from our broad engagements enabling you to growth personally and professionally. Be part of our diverse Cybersecurity team and play a pivotal role in delivering security engagements spanning Exposure Management, Security Architecture, Cloud Security, and many more. Serve as key contact for our clients, taking on the end-to-end management and successful delivery of our engagements. Provide strategic guidance to clients to support them on their cyber journey. Drive the evaluation and implementation of cyber technologies to improve the cybersecurity maturity of our clients. Build and drive your own cyber capability, from business development to contributing to the development of innovative services within our cyber technology and transformation practice. Shape and mentor cross-functional teams to develop and execute long term client relationships and to accelerate a collaborative work environment. Min. 5 years of relevant experience in Cybersecurity and prior consulting experience from either a consultancy firm or an internal corporate consulting function or role. Master's or bachelor's degree or an equivalent professional qualification. Additional certificates such as CISSP, CISM, SSCP are a plus. Knowledge and hands on experience in managing security projects in key domains such as security operations, security architecture, Identity and Access Management (IAM), cloud security etc. Strong verbal and written communication skills to interact effectively with all levels of management and staff. Fluent in English; German or French are a plus.
descriptionByLocale.de: Sind Sie bereit, zur erfolgreichen Durchführung von Cyber Technology & Transformation-Mandaten beizutragen? Dies ist eine spannende Möglichkeit, unserem schnell wachsenden Cyber Technology and Transformation-Team beizutreten. Wir begleiten unsere Kunden auf dem gesamten Weg der Cybersicherheit, von Technologiebewertungen über die Identifizierung und Implementierung von Cyber-Lösungen bis hin zur Definition von Cyber-Strategien und vielem mehr. Sie profitieren von einem grossartigen Team und von unseren vielfältigen Mandaten, die Ihnen ermöglichen, persönlich und beruflich zu wachsen. Sein Sie Teil unseres vielfältigen Cybersecurity-Teams und spielen Sie eine zentrale Rolle bei der Durchführung von Sicherheitsmandaten in den Bereichen Exposure Management, Security Architecture, Cloud Security und vielem mehr. Dienen Sie als Hauptansprechpartner für unsere Kunden und übernehmen Sie das End-to-End-Management und die erfolgreiche Durchführung unserer Mandate. Bieten Sie Kunden strategische Beratung zur Unterstützung ihres Cyber-Weges. Fördern Sie die Evaluierung und Implementierung von Cyber-Technologien zur Verbesserung der Cybersecurity-Reife unserer Kunden. Bauen und entwickeln Sie Ihre eigene Cyber-Kompetenz, von der Geschäftsentwicklung bis hin zum Beitrag zur Entwicklung innovativer Dienstleistungen innerhalb unserer Cyber Technology and Transformation Practice. Gestalten und fördern Sie funktionsübergreifende Teams zur Entwicklung und Pflege langfristiger Kundenbeziehungen und zur Förderung eines kollaborativen Arbeitsumfelds. Min. 5 Jahre relevante Erfahrung in Cybersecurity und frühere Beratungserfahrung entweder in einer Unternehmensberatung oder einer internen Corporate-Beratungsfunktion oder -rolle. Master- oder Bachelorabschluss oder eine gleichwertige Berufsqualifikation. Zusätzliche Zertifizierungen wie CISSP, CISM, SSCP sind von Vorteil. Kenntnisse und praktische Erfahrung in der Leitung von Sicherheitsprojekten in Schlüsselbereichen wie Sicherheitsoperationen, Sicherheitsarchitektur, Identity and Access Management (IAM), Cloud-Sicherheit usw. Ausgeprägte verbale und schriftliche Kommunikationsfähigkeiten für effektive Interaktion mit allen Management- und Personalebenen. Fliessend in Englisch; Deutsch oder Französisch sind ein Plus.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Êtes-vous prêt à contribuer à la réalisation réussie de missions dans le domaine Cyber Technology & Transformation? C'est une opportunité passionnante de rejoindre notre équipe Cyber Technology and Transformation en forte croissance. Nous accompagnons nos clients tout au long de leur parcours en matière de cybersécurité, allant des évaluations technologiques, à l'identification et à la mise en œuvre de solutions cyber, à la définition de stratégies cyber et bien plus encore. Vous bénéficiez d'une excellente équipe avec laquelle travailler et de nos nombreuses missions qui vous permettent de croître personnellement et professionnellement. Faites partie de notre équipe Cybersecurity diversifiée et jouez un rôle essentiel dans la réalisation de missions de sécurité couvrant l'Exposure Management, la Security Architecture, la Cloud Security, et bien plus encore. Servir de contact clé pour nos clients, en prenant en charge la gestion de bout en bout et la livraison réussie de nos missions. Fournir des orientations stratégiques aux clients pour les soutenir dans leur parcours cyber. Diriger l'évaluation et la mise en œuvre de technologies cyber pour améliorer la maturité en cybersécurité de nos clients. Construire et développer votre propre capacité cyber, du développement commercial jusqu'à la contribution au développement de services innovants au sein de notre practice de cyber technology et transformation. Former et encadrer des équipes interfonctionnelles pour développer et exécuter des relations clients à long terme et accélérer un environnement de travail collaboratif. Min. 5 ans d'expérience pertinente en Cybersécurité et expérience préalable en conseil, soit dans un cabinet de conseil, soit dans une fonction ou un rôle de conseil interne à l'entreprise. Master ou licence ou une qualification professionnelle équivalente. Des certifications supplémentaires telles que CISSP, CISM, SSCP sont un plus. Connaissance et expérience pratique dans la gestion de projets de sécurité dans des domaines clés tels que les opérations de sécurité, l'architecture de sécurité, la gestion des identités et des accès (IAM), la sécurité cloud, etc. Fortes compétences de communication verbale et écrite pour interagir efficacement avec tous les niveaux de la direction et du personnel. Couramment anglophone ; l'allemand ou le français sont un plus.

jobs.title: Senior Manager Insurance Consulting
jobs.description:
• Manage multi-disciplinary project teams at our clients to provide a broad range of solutions and capabilities including operational improvement, profitability management, finance function activities and business integration.

• Advise our clients on their change initiatives and operating model design.

• Driving the topic customer excellence, sales and distribution management for our clients in the financial service industry.

• Work with stakeholders across all business functions, including technology partners, to communicate the impact of new regulation.

• Deepen your expertise and grow through tailored trainings and access to learning and development.

• A degree preferably in business, communication, IT, engineering, or digital discipline and at least 8 years of work experience.

• Gained previous work experience in the (re)insurance industry or in consulting and you bring relevant experience in customer experience strategy projects and/or transformation projects backed by technology.

• Analytical thinking, high customer orientation and a high motivation to work in a dynamic team are your distinguishing characteristics.

• Experience in program management for large scale projects and programs.

• Deep understanding of related business processes playing a leading role in a large transformation program ideally combined with agile/SAFe experience.

• Fluent in German and English (both spoken and written).

titleByLocale.it: Senior Manager Consulting Assicurativo
titleByLocale.en: Senior Manager Insurance Consulting
titleByLocale.fr: Senior Manager Insurance Consulting

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione - Gestisci team di progetto multidisciplinari presso i nostri clienti per fornire una vasta gamma di soluzioni e capacità, tra cui miglioramento operativo, gestione della redditività, attività della funzione finanziaria e integrazione aziendale. - Consiglia i nostri clienti sulle loro iniziative di cambiamento e sulla progettazione del modello operativo. - Guidare il tema dell'eccellenza del cliente, della gestione delle vendite e della distribuzione per i nostri clienti nel settore dei servizi finanziari. - Lavorare con le parti interessate di tutte le funzioni aziendali, compresi i partner tecnologici, per comunicare l'impatto delle nuove normative. - Approfondisci la tua esperienza e cresci attraverso formazione personalizzata e accesso a opportunità di apprendimento e sviluppo. ## Requisiti - Una laurea preferibilmente in economia, comunicazione, IT, ingegneria o disciplina digitale e almeno 8 anni di esperienza lavorativa. - Esperienza lavorativa precedente nel settore assicurativo (ri) o nella consulenza e portare esperienza rilevante in progetti di strategia di esperienza del cliente e/o progetti di trasformazione supportati dalla tecnologia. - Pensiero analitico, alta orientamento al cliente e alta motivazione a lavorare in un team dinamico sono le tue caratteristiche distintive. - Esperienza nella gestione di programmi per progetti e programmi su larga scala. - Profonda comprensione dei processi aziendali correlati, svolgendo un ruolo di leadership in un grande programma di trasformazione, idealmente combinato con esperienza agile/SAFe. - Fluente in tedesco e inglese (sia parlato che scritto).
descriptionByLocale.en: Descrizione - Manage multi-disciplinary project teams at our clients to provide a broad range of solutions and capabilities including operational improvement, profitability management, finance function activities and business integration. - Advise our clients on their change initiatives and operating model design. - Driving the topic customer excellence, sales and distribution management for our clients in the financial service industry. - Work with stakeholders across all business functions, including technology partners, to communicate the impact of new regulation. - Deepen your expertise and grow through tailored trainings and access to learning and development. ## Requisiti - A degree preferably in business, communication, IT, engineering, or digital discipline and at least 8 years of work experience. - Gained previous work experience in the (re)insurance industry or in consulting and you bring relevant experience in customer experience strategy projects and/or transformation projects backed by technology. - Analytical thinking, high customer orientation and a high motivation to work in a dynamic team are your distinguishing characteristics. - Experience in program management for large scale projects and programs. - Deep understanding of related business processes playing a leading role in a large transformation program ideally combined with agile/SAFe experience. - Fluent in German and English (both spoken and written).
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung - Leiten Sie multidisziplinäre Projektteams bei unseren Kunden, um eine breite Palette von Lösungen und Fähigkeiten anzubieten, einschließlich operativer Verbesserung, Profitabilitätsmanagement, Finanzierungsaktivitäten und Geschäftsintegration. - Beraten Sie unsere Kunden bei ihren Veränderungsinitiativen und der Gestaltung des Betriebsmodells. - Förderung des Themas Kundenzufriedenheit, Vertriebs- und Distributionsmanagement für unsere Kunden in der Finanzdienstleistungsbranche. - Arbeiten Sie mit Stakeholdern aller Geschäftsbereiche, einschließlich Technologiepartnern, zusammen, um die Auswirkungen neuer Vorschriften zu kommunizieren. - Vertiefen Sie Ihre Expertise und wachsen Sie durch maßgeschneiderte Schulungen und Zugang zu Lernen und Entwicklung. ## Anforderungen - Ein Abschluss bevorzugt in Betriebswirtschaft, Kommunikation, IT, Ingenieurwesen oder digitaler Disziplin und mindestens 8 Jahre Berufserfahrung. - Frühere Berufserfahrung in der (Wieder-) Versicherungsbranche oder in der Beratung und Sie bringen relevante Erfahrung in Kundenexperience-Strategieprojekten und/oder Transformationsprojekten, die durch Technologie unterstützt werden. - Analytisches Denken, hohe Kundenorientierung und eine hohe Motivation, in einem dynamischen Team zu arbeiten, sind Ihre herausragenden Eigenschaften. - Erfahrung in der Programmmanagement für große Projekte und Programme. - Tiefes Verständnis von damit verbundenen Geschäftsprozessen, das eine führende Rolle in einem großen Transformationsprogramm idealerweise kombiniert mit agiler/SAFe-Erfahrung. - Fließend in Deutsch und Englisch (beides gesprochen und geschrieben).
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description - Gérez des équipes de projet multidisciplinaires chez nos clients pour fournir une large gamme de solutions et de capacités, y compris l'amélioration opérationnelle, la gestion de la rentabilité, les activités de la fonction financière et l'intégration commerciale. - Conseillez nos clients sur leurs initiatives de changement et la conception de leur modèle opérationnel. - Pilotage du thème de l'excellence client, de la gestion des ventes et de la distribution pour nos clients dans le secteur des services financiers. - Travaillez avec les parties prenantes de toutes les fonctions commerciales, y compris les partenaires technologiques, pour communiquer l'impact des nouvelles réglementations. - Approfondissez votre expertise et grandissez grâce à des formations personnalisées et à l'accès à l'apprentissage et au développement. ## Exigences - Un diplôme de préférence en économie, communication, IT, ingénierie ou discipline numérique et au moins 8 ans d'expérience professionnelle. - Expérience professionnelle antérieure dans le secteur de l'assurance (ré) ou du conseil et vous apportez une expérience pertinente dans les projets de stratégie d'expérience client et/ou les projets de transformation soutenus par la technologie. - Pensée analytique, orientation client élevée et motivation élevée pour travailler dans une équipe dynamique sont vos caractéristiques distinctives. - Expérience dans la gestion de programmes pour des projets et des programmes à grande échelle. - Compréhension approfondie des processus commerciaux liés, jouant un rôle de leader dans un grand programme de transformation idéalement combiné avec une expérience agile/SAFe. - Courant en allemand et en anglais (à la fois parlé et écrit).

jobs.title: Corporate Tax (Senior) Manager
jobs.description:
• You will be offered exciting career opportunities as well as a broad tax and management training programme

• You will be given the opportunity to develop and lead your initiatives as building blocks for your career

• You will deepen your expertise in tax consulting, planning and structuring, mergers and acquisitions, etc. through a variety of high profile clients and projects

• You will work in a diversified, international environment covering multiple service areas and industries.

• You will build, foster and develop relationships with clients and be dedicated to provide exceptional services.

• You will develop your leadership skills working in high performing teams and help your staff grow through effective coaching.

• You have a degree in accounting, economics, business or law, and preferably the Swiss tax expert diploma.

• You have at least 5 years proven experience in corporate tax (Swiss and international).

• You speak fluent French and English; German would be a plus.

• You have high emotional intelligence, with strong communication and relationship management skills.

• You are motivated; team- and client-oriented; and want to take on responsibility from the start.

• You take initiatives and are a natural problem solver who challenges the status quo.

• You want to develop professionally and personally in an environment with an active coaching and feedback culture.

titleByLocale.it: Responsabile delle Tasse Societarie (Senior)
titleByLocale.en: Corporate Tax (Senior) Manager
titleByLocale.fr: Gestionnaire de l’impôt des sociétés (Senior)

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione - Avrai l'opportunità di sviluppare la tua carriera con un ampio programma di formazione fiscale e manageriale. - Avrai la possibilità di sviluppare e guidare le tue iniziative come fondamenta per la tua carriera. - Profonderai la tua esperienza nel consulenza fiscale, pianificazione e strutturazione, mergers e acquisizioni, ecc. attraverso una varietà di clienti e progetti di alto profilo. - Lavorerai in un ambiente internazionale diversificato che copre diverse aree di servizio e settori. - Svilupperai e rafforzerai le tue relazioni con i clienti e ti impegnerai a fornire servizi eccezionali. - Svilupperai le tue competenze di leadership lavorando in team di alta prestazione e aiutando il tuo personale a crescere attraverso un coaching efficace. ## Requisiti - Laurea in contabilità, economia, business o diritto, e preferibilmente il diploma di esperto fiscale svizzero. - Esperienza di almeno 5 anni nel settore del fisco aziendale (svizzero e internazionale). - Fluente in francese e inglese; il tedesco sarebbe un plus. - Alta intelligenza emotiva, con forti competenze di comunicazione e gestione delle relazioni. - Motivato; orientato al team e ai clienti; e pronto a assumere responsabilità fin dall'inizio. - Presto a prendere iniziative e un naturalista risolvere problemi che sfida lo status quo. - Vuoi svilupparti professionalmente e personalmente in un ambiente con una cultura attiva di coaching e feedback.
descriptionByLocale.en: Descrizione - You will be offered exciting career opportunities as well as a broad tax and management training programme - You will be given the opportunity to develop and lead your initiatives as building blocks for your career - You will deepen your expertise in tax consulting, planning and structuring, mergers and acquisitions, etc. through a variety of high profile clients and projects - You will work in a diversified, international environment covering multiple service areas and industries. - You will build, foster and develop relationships with clients and be dedicated to provide exceptional services. - You will develop your leadership skills working in high performing teams and help your staff grow through effective coaching. ## Requisiti - Degree in accounting, economics, business or law, and preferably the Swiss tax expert diploma. - At least 5 years proven experience in corporate tax (Swiss and international). - Fluent in French and English; German would be a plus. - High emotional intelligence, with strong communication and relationship management skills. - Motivated; team- and client-oriented; and want to take on responsibility from the start. - Takes initiatives and is a natural problem solver who challenges the status quo. - Want to develop professionally and personally in an environment with an active coaching and feedback culture.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung - Du wirst mit spannenden Karrierechancen und einem umfassenden Steuer- und Management-Trainingsprogramm ausgestattet. - Du wirst die Möglichkeit haben, deine eigenen Initiativen zu entwickeln und zu leiten, die dein Karrierebaugrund sind. - Du wirst deine Expertise in Steuerberatung, -planung und -strukturierung, Mergers & Acquisitions und mehr durch eine Vielzahl von hochprofileten Kunden und Projekten vertiefen. - Du wirst in einer diversifizierten, internationalen Umgebung arbeiten, die mehrere Dienstleistungsbereiche und Branchen abdeckt. - Du wirst Beziehungen zu Kunden aufbauen, pflegen und entwickeln und dich darauf konzentrieren, herausragende Dienstleistungen zu bieten. - Du wirst deine Führungsfähigkeiten entwickeln, indem du in leistungsstarken Teams arbeitest und dein Team durch effektives Coaching unterstützen. ## Anforderungen - Abschluss in Buchhaltung, Wirtschaft, Business oder Recht, und vorzugsweise der Schweizer Steuerexperten-Diplom. - Mindestens 5 Jahre bewährte Erfahrung im Bereich der Unternehmenssteuer (Schweiz und international). - Fließend in Französisch und Englisch; Deutsch wäre ein Plus. - Hohe emotionale Intelligenz mit starken Kommunikations- und Relationship-Management-Kompetenzen. - Motiviert; team- und clientorientiert; und bereit, Verantwortung von Anfang an zu übernehmen. - Neugierig und bereit, Initiativen zu ergreifen und Probleme zu lösen, die den Status quo herausfordern. - Möchtest dich beruflich und persönlich in einer Umgebung mit einer aktiven Coaching- und Feedback-Kultur weiterentwickeln.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description - Vous serez offert des opportunités de carrière excitantes ainsi qu'un programme de formation fiscale et de gestion large. - Vous aurez l'opportunité de développer et de diriger vos initiatives comme fondements de votre carrière. - Vous approfondirez votre expertise en conseil fiscal, planification et structuration, fusions et acquisitions, etc. à travers une variété de clients et de projets de haut profil. - Vous travaillerez dans un environnement international diversifié couvrant plusieurs domaines de service et secteurs. - Vous développerez et renforcerez vos relations avec les clients et vous engagez à fournir des services exceptionnels. - Vous développerez vos compétences de leadership en travaillant dans des équipes de haute performance et en aidant votre personnel à croître grâce à un coaching efficace. ## Requisits - Diplôme en comptabilité, économie, commerce ou droit, et de préférence le diplôme de l'expert fiscal suisse. - Expérience de au moins 5 ans dans le domaine de la fiscalité d'entreprise (suisse et internationale). - Fluide en français et anglais; le allemand serait un plus. - Forte intelligence émotionnelle, avec de solides compétences en communication et en gestion des relations. - Motivé; orienté équipe et client; et prêt à prendre la responsabilité dès le début. - Prêt à prendre des initiatives et à être un solveur de problèmes naturel qui défie le statu quo. - Voulez-vous développer professionnellement et personnellement dans un environnement avec une culture active de coaching et de feedback.

jobs.title: (Senior) Manager SAP Financial Services Consulting
jobs.description:
• A career in our SAP Finance practice, within Financial Services Consulting, will provide you with the opportunity to help our Financial Services clients maximise the value of their SAP investments by transforming their entire Finance Operating Model and make their Finance Function fit for the digital era.

• We provide comprehensive consulting, system integration and implementation services across multiple SAP applications, products and technologies. Simply put, we focus on delivering business led, technology enabled change for our clients including industry specific enterprise resource planning and the latest in mobile, analytics and cloud solutions.

• In joining our SAP Finance team, you'll work with our clients to transform their finance function and processes by leveraging SAP applications to enhance their core transaction processing and reporting competencies ultimately strengthening their ability to support management decision making and corporate strategy.

• As a Senior Manager, you'll work as part of a team of problem solvers, helping to solve complex business issues from strategy to execution.

• Be part of a growing, dynamic team blending SAP innovation and industry expertise.

• Thrive in an environment committed to teamwork, trust, and mutual support.

• Demonstrated intimate knowledge and / or proven record of success in consulting, designing, implementing and leading consulting engagements within the SAP Finance suite for Financial Services clients.

• Extensive-level experience in implementing relevant solutions like SAP Finance, SAP S/4HANA, SAP PaPM and / or SAP FPSL.

• Proven the ability to compare and contrast SAP solutions and help clients identify the capabilities to drive business value.

• Able to execute SAP financials-focused roadmap projects including delivery estimates and quantifiable value cases

• Experience leading SAP transformation programs across process, technology and people enablement.

• Demonstrated thorough abilities and success as a team leader by creating as positive environment, monitoring workloads of the team while meeting client expectations and respecting the work-life quality of team members, providing candid, meaningful feedback in a timely manner and keeping leadership informed of progress and issues.

• Consider solutions from a holistic End-to-End point of view and you want to drive innovative solutions and thrive in challenging client projects.

• Fluent in German and English.

titleByLocale.it: Responsabile (Senior) SAP Financial Services Consulting
titleByLocale.en: (Senior) Manager SAP Financial Services Consulting
titleByLocale.fr: (Aîné) Gestionnaire Services financiers SAP Conseil

descriptionByLocale.it: **Titolo della posizione:** Senior Manager, SAP Finance **Sommario della posizione:** Una carriera nella nostra practice SAP Finance, nell'ambito della Financial Services Consulting, ti offrirà l'opportunità di aiutare i nostri clienti dei Servizi Finanziari a massimizzare il valore dei loro investimenti SAP trasformando l'intero Finance Operating Model e rendendo la loro funzione Finance pronta per l'era digitale. **Responsabilità della posizione:** Forniamo servizi completi di consulenza, integrazione di sistemi e implementazione su molteplici applicazioni, prodotti e tecnologie SAP. In poche parole, ci concentriamo sulla fornitura di un cambiamento guidato dal business e abilitato dalla tecnologia per i nostri clienti, inclusa la pianificazione delle risorse aziendali specifica del settore e le ultime soluzioni mobile, analytics e cloud. Entrando a far parte del nostro team SAP Finance, lavorerai con i nostri clienti per trasformare la loro funzione finanziaria e i processi sfruttando le applicazioni SAP per migliorare le loro competenze core di elaborazione delle transazioni e reporting, rafforzando infine la loro capacità di supportare il processo decisionale del management e la strategia aziendale. Come Senior Manager, lavorerai come parte di un team di problem solver, contribuendo a risolvere problemi aziendali complessi dalla strategia all'esecuzione. **Requisiti:** * Dimostrata profonda conoscenza e/o comprovata esperienza di successo nella consulenza, nella progettazione, nell'implementazione e nella guida di incarichi di consulenza nell'ambito della suite SAP Finance per clienti dei Servizi Finanziari. * Esperienza approfondita nell'implementazione di soluzioni rilevanti come SAP Finance, SAP S/4HANA, SAP PaPM e/o SAP FPSL. * Comprovata capacità di confrontare e mettere a confronto le soluzioni SAP e aiutare i clienti a identificare le capacità per creare valore aziendale. * Capacità di eseguire progetti di roadmap focalizzati sui finanziari SAP, incluse stime di consegna e casi di valore quantificabili. * Esperienza nella guida di programmi di trasformazione SAP su processo, tecnologia e abilitazione delle persone. * Dimostrate capacità e successo come team leader attraverso la creazione di un ambiente positivo, il monitoraggio dei carichi di lavoro del team nel rispetto delle aspettative dei clienti e della qualità vita-lavoro dei membri del team, fornendo feedback candidi e significativi in modo tempestivo e tenendo informata la leadership sui progressi e sui problemi. * Considerare le soluzioni da un punto di vista olistico End-to-End e promuovere soluzioni innovative, prosperando in progetti cliente sfidanti. * Padronanza del tedesco e dell'inglese.
